theme_archetype.design_dna: Retaining Torado Group's existing glassmorphism and aurora (purple to indigo) gradient, but elevating it with Apple-level optical clarity, crisp 1px inner borders, and high-density functional typography.

typography.tabular_font: JetBrains Mono or IBM Plex Mono (Fallback: Inter with 'tabular-nums')

rules.headings: Tracking tight (tracking-tighter), leading-none, semi-bold to bold. Keep sizes moderate (max text-3xl for dashboards) to maintain ERP density.
rules.financial_figures: MUST use 'tabular-nums' utility class to ensure character widths match, preventing jumping numbers in tables and waterfalls. Align RIGHT.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense but calm. Eliminate unnecessary padding in data tables to show more rows, but maintain generous padding around the main page layout and KPI cards.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4) with gap-4 or gap-6 for KPI cards.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Glassmorphism components MUST use 'backdrop-blur-xl', 'backdrop-saturate-150', and a 1px border. Shadow should be soft 'shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]'.

kpi_executive_cards.purpose: 4 KPI metric cards (Revenue, Gross Profit, Net Profit, Δ Net).
kpi_executive_cards.structure: Glass-card with top-left metric title, top-right Lucide icon (opacity 50). Center large tabular number. Bottom section for Compare delta (chip with positive/negative color).
kpi_executive_cards.interactions: MUST be clickable. Use 'cursor-pointer hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200'. Add 'group' class to card and 'group-hover:text-indigo-500' to icons for subtle feedback.

waterfall_chart.purpose: Profit Walk visualization from Revenue down to Net Profit.
waterfall_chart.implementation_recharts: 1. Map data to compute 'running' totals. 2. Pass '[low, high]' array to Recharts <Bar dataKey="range"> to make bars float. 3. Use custom 'shape' or 'cell' to color Gains (Green/Aurora), Losses (Red/Orange), and Totals (Solid Aurora).
waterfall_chart.connector_lines: Recharts doesn't natively draw connector lines. Create a custom SVG overlay or use <ReferenceLine> / <Customized> component to draw thin lines (stroke-width 1, dashed, border color) connecting the top of the previous bar to the top of the next.
waterfall_chart.labels: Include direct value labels on top of bars. Do not rely solely on tooltips for executive ERPs.

expandable_financial_table.purpose: Detail per Stage table (Stage | Period | Compare | Δ | Δ% | Running) with high usability.
expandable_financial_table.structure: Use Shadcn Table. Financial columns MUST be text-right and tabular-nums. Use sticky header.
expandable_financial_table.interactions: Rows must have 'hover:bg-muted/50 cursor-pointer'. Add a ChevronRight icon to the first cell that rotates 90deg when expanded.
expandable_financial_table.expanded_state: When clicked, insert a conditional <TableRow> containing a full-width <TableCell colSpan={6}>. Inside, render a sub-table or bento-style breakdown (e.g., Drivers, By-Outlet) with a slightly darker/indented background to indicate hierarchy.

daily_sales_wizard.purpose: Consolidated entry wizard replacing disjointed menus.
daily_sales_wizard.structure: Horizontal Stepper (Channel -> Revenue -> Tax -> Payment -> Review).
daily_sales_wizard.ui_pattern: Use active/inactive step indicators (pills). The active step uses the 'pill-active' aurora gradient. Forms inside should use Shadcn form components, laid out cleanly in a max-w-2xl container. Add clear 'Next' and 'Back' button placement at the bottom.

top_drivers_list.purpose: Quick snapshot of what is impacting the numbers the most.
top_drivers_list.structure: Dense list layout. Left: Driver name + subtle category badge. Right: Monetary impact (green/red) + sparkline if possible.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer motion on page load: initial opacity-0 translate-y-4, animate to opacity-100 translate-y-0. Stagger children by 0.05s.
motion_and_interactions.skeleton_loading: Use Shadcn <Skeleton>. Instead of plain gray pulses, give skeletons a subtle shimmer matching the aurora vibe (e.g., purple/indigo hue at 10% opacity).

instructions_to_main_agent.1: DO NOT use standard Shadcn flat cards for the dashboard. Apply the glassmorphism utility classes defined here to match the 'Torado Group' visual DNA.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: When building the Recharts waterfall, strictly follow the [low, high] array logic for floating bars. Render connector lines manually using the Recharts <Customized> component if possible.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: For the expandable table, ensure 'tabular-nums' is applied to all number columns. Build the expanded row as a seamless extension of the parent row.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Consolidate the Daily Sales and Sales Wizard into a single Stepper component. Use Framer Motion (AnimatePresence) to slide between steps.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Testing: Add `data-testid` attributes to all interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid="kpi-card-revenue"`, `data-testid="expand-row-btn"`).
